news.title:
Tata Technologies held analyst/investor meetings on March 11, 2026, with firms like Goldman Sachs, White Oak Capital.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during these interactions, ensuring compliance with SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Tata Technologies partners with WHIS to integrate SAFE RTOS into SDV software, enhancing safety and performance.
Collaboration supports OEMs in meeting ISO 26262 standards, advancing next-gen mobility solutions.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Technologies Ltd. held an analyst/investor meet on Feb 26, 2026.
Interactions included Karma Capital, ICICI Prudential, Amundi, and others; no UPSI shared.
news.summary:
Tata Technologies Ltd. held an analyst/investor meet on Feb 26, 2026.

news.title:
Tata Technologies shared an investor presentation on Feb 26-27, 2026, discussing market outlook and growth drivers.
Key topics include market slowdown, AI impact, engineering priorities, and focus on resilient long-term growth.
news.summary:
Tata Technologies shared an investor presentation on Feb 26-27, 2026, discussing market outlook and growth drivers.

news.title:
TCS and Infosys face challenges from AI disruption, leading to restructuring and margin pressure.
Specialized IT firms like Coforge and Persistent Systems thrive in AI-driven sectors like travel and EVs.

news.title:
Tata Technologies anticipates a strong FY26 despite global uncertainties.
CEO Warren Harris cites automakers' continued investments as a growth driver.
news.summary:
Tata Technologies anticipates a strong FY26 despite global uncertainties.
CEO Warren Harris cites automakers' continued investments as a growth driver.

news.title:
Tata Tech expects ES-TEC to contribute additional growth in FY27.
The aerospace sector is projected to reach $40M by FY26, boosting prospects.
news.summary:

news.title:
Motilal Oswal retains a Sell rating for Tata Tech.
Target price revised downward to ₹550 from ₹580.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal retains a Sell rating for Tata Tech.

news.title:
Tata Technologies shared the audio recording of its earnings call for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
The recording is accessible on the company's website, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Technologies expects 10% sequential revenue growth in Q4 FY26.
The company targets double-digit organic growth for FY27.
news.summary:
Tata Technologies expects 10% sequential revenue growth in Q4 FY26.
The company targets double-digit organic growth for FY27.

news.title:
Tata Technologies announced management changes, appointing Mr. Dhiman Gupta as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director from Jan 16, 2026.
Resignations include Mr. Balaje Rajan as Director (Jan 15, 2026) and Mr. Vikrant Gandhe as Company Secretary (Jan 16, 2026).
news.summary:
Tata Technologies announced management changes, appointing Mr. Dhiman Gupta as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director from Jan 16, 2026.
Resignations include Mr. Balaje Rajan as Director (Jan 15, 2026) and Mr. Vikrant Gandhe as Company Secretary (Jan 16, 2026).

news.title:
Tata Technologies Q3 revenue rises 3.2% QoQ to 13,657M; EBITDA margin at 14.1%.
Net income margin stands at 9.9%; secured six strategic deals, including automotive OEMs.
news.summary:
Tata Technologies Q3 revenue rises 3.2% QoQ to 13,657M; EBITDA margin at 14.1%.
Net income margin stands at 9.9%; secured six strategic deals, including automotive OEMs.

news.title:
Tata Tech's Q3 profit fell 96% to ₹66.4M due to ₹1.4B one-time labour code charge.
Revenue rose 3.7% to ₹13.66B; Q4 expects 10%+ sequential growth, per CEO.
news.summary:
Tata Tech's Q3 profit fell 96% to ₹66.4M due to ₹1.4B one-time labour code charge.
Revenue rose 3.7% to ₹13.66B; Q4 expects 10%+ sequential growth, per CEO.

news.title:
IKOMA Technologies reported a net loss of Rs 0.62 crore in Q2 FY25, up from Rs 0.57 crore in Q2 FY24.
The company's reported sales remained nil during the September 2025 quarter.
